# Agent Action Guard (llms.txt)

This file provides a machine-readable overview of the repository for AI tools and crawlers.

Project
- Name: Agent Action Guard
- Repository: https://github.com/Pro-GenAI/Agent-Action-Guard
- Package: https://pypi.org/project/agent-action-guard/
- Purpose: Classify proposed AI agent actions as safe or harmful before tool execution.

What this project does
- Screens agent/tool actions at runtime.
- Returns a harmful/safe decision with confidence.
- Supports integration in agent loops and MCP-compatible tooling.
- Provides benchmark and dataset artifacts for reproducible evaluation.

Primary API
- Python import: from agent_action_guard import is_action_harmful
- Typical use:
  1) is_harmful, confidence = is_action_harmful(action_dict)
  2) Block or require approval when is_harmful is True.

Quick install
- Runtime only:
  pip install agent-action-guard
- Runtime + HarmActionsEval CLI:
  pip install "agent-action-guard[harmactionseval]"
- Full optional extras (embedding/demo scripts):
  pip install "agent-action-guard[all]"

Core repository paths
- agent_action_guard/: Runtime classifier package, model assets, benchmark module.
- tests/: Unit tests for classifier behavior.
- examples/: Integration examples and embedding host scripts.
- training/: Model training scripts and related artifacts.
- USAGE.md: Integration and environment setup details.
- README.md: Project overview, motivation, benchmark snapshot, links.

Operational notes
- The classifier may use embedding infrastructure depending on integration mode.
- For vector/embedding-backed setups, configure EMBED_MODEL_NAME, EMBEDDING_BASE_URL, and EMBEDDING_API_KEY.
- The documented baseline embedding model is sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2.

Evaluation
- HarmActionsEval module and CLI are included for benchmark-style runs.
- Example invocation:
  python -m agent_action_guard.harmactionseval --k 3

Policy and safety intent
- Goal: prevent harmful, unethical, or risky autonomous actions.
- Recommended: combine model decisions with deterministic rule checks for high-risk systems.

License
- CC BY 4.0
- See LICENSE.md for full terms.

Canonical docs for agents
- AGENTS.md
- README.md
- USAGE.md
